Human Readable Output
3. Get a list of detections
Get a list of confirmed detections.
Base Command
redcanary-list-detections
Input

!redcanary-update-remediation-state id=4 remediation-state=not_remediated_false_positive comment="updated by DBot"
Human Readable Output
3. Get a list of detections
Get a list of confirmed detections.
Base Command
redcanary-list-detections
Input
Argument Name
name: redcanary-list-detections

outputs.description: Detection ID RedCanary.Detection.Headline Human-readable text about the detection
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.ID

outputs.description: The severity level of the detection (High, medium, or Low) RedCanary.Detection.Summary A summary of information about the detection
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.Severity

outputs.description: date The time the detection was confirmed as a threat by Red Canary RedCanary.Detection.Acknowledged
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.Time

outputs.description: Whether or not the detection is acknowledged RedCanary.Detection.RemediationStatus The state the detection is currently in
outputs.name: boolean

outputs.description: The reason for the detection RedCanary.Detection.EndpointUserID The ID of the user in the infected endpoint
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.Reason

outputs.description: The ID of the endpoint infected in the detection Endpoint.Hostname Fully-qualified endpoint hostname
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.EndpointID

outputs.description: Endpoint ID Endpoint.IPAddress IP address of the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.ID

outputs.description: MAC address of the endpoint Endpoint.OS The operating system used by the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.MACAddress

outputs.description: The complete operating system version identifier used by the endpoint Endpoint.Memory Physical memory of the endpoint in bytes
outputs.name: Endpoint.OSVersion

outputs.description: Whether or not the endpoint is currently network isolated Endpoint.IsDecommissioned Whether or not the endpoint is decommissioned
outputs.name: Endpoint.IsIsolated

outputs.description: Endpoint user name Account.Hostname Endpoint host name
outputs.name: Account.Username
